component.name: CrossMacro
component.summary: Cross-platform Mouse and Keyboard Macro Automation Tool

description.p: CrossMacro is a powerful cross-platform mouse and keyboard macro recording and playback tool. It supports recording inputs, text expansion, and playing them back with adjustable speed and looping. Works on Linux (Wayland/X11), Windows, and macOS.
Features:

ul.li: Record and replay mouse movements, clicks, and keyboard events
Text Expansion support for productivity
Cross-platform support (Linux Wayland/X11, Windows, macOS)
Global hotkeys for control
Adjustable playback speed and loop mode

screenshot.caption: Recording Tab - Record mouse and keyboard macros
Playback Tab - Play recorded macros with customizable settings
Files Tab - Manage saved macro files
Text Expansion Tab - Create text shortcuts

description.p: Version 1.3.1 - Native AOT compilation, major CLI performance optimizations, and Linux uinput stabilization fixes.

ul.li: Added Native AOT compilation support for CLI and UI packages, eliminating the .NET runtime dependency and dramatically reducing binary size, startup latency, and memory footprint.
Optimized Linux virtual uinput device creation and stabilization using dynamic sysfs and ioctl calls, dropping sequential run delays.
Optimized CLI startup by lazily evaluating capability probes and conditionally bypassing profile initialization, saving multiple redundant disk I/O operations on macro runs.
Fixed a desktop entry filename casing issue across Linux packages to ensure standard application launcher compliance.
Fixed a potential race condition (ENOENT) during evdev hardware device scanning when a temporary virtual uinput node is destroyed.
Replaced the IsCapturing boolean with EditorCaptureMode enum in the UI editor to support rich macro recording states.

description.p: Version 1.3.0 - Screen-reading support, profile management, and input simulation improvements.

ul.li: Added pixelcolor, waitcolor, and pixelsearch commands for color-based automation.
Added built-in color picker and region capture controls for editor actions.
Added support for native screen capturing backends.
Added profile management to easily save, load, and switch configuration profiles.
Added Fast and Compatible (Key-by-Key) method selector for Direct Typing text expansion to resolve character skipping.
Added scheduler safeguards to prevent burst-firing of macros after system stalls.
Improved Linux AppImage and Flatpak diagnostics to reliably detect missing input recording permissions upfront.

description.p: Version 1.2.1 - Multiline text expansion editing and updated GNOME Shell integration metadata.

ul.li: Added multiline text input and expansion support for text expansion entries and editor text actions.
Added GNOME Shell 50 and 51 extension metadata support for newer GNOME environments.

description.p: Version 1.2.0 - Linux coordinate playback, diagnostics, input reliability, and package runtime improvements.

ul.li: Improved Linux coordinate recording and playback with clearer absolute and relative coordinate handling.
Expanded Linux daemon, socket, input backend, and doctor diagnostics with clearer startup notifications and troubleshooting details.
Improved direct input capture edge cases, unavailable backend reporting, horizontal scroll recording, and stale daemon event handling.
Added Niri keyboard layout detection for better Wayland desktop integration.
Improved Linux package runtime reliability, including AppImage ICU bundling and hardened Arch daemon installation.

description.p: Version 1.1.0 - Better editor workflows, smoother text expansion, randomized timing controls, stronger Linux integration, and more reliable packages.

ul.li: Added minimized startup, loaded macro playlists, editor filtering, multi-select controls, clearer toolbar actions, bundled icons, and more reliable editor selection behavior.
Added clipboard-free text expansion, faster direct typing, safer paste insertion, and improved clipboard behavior across native sessions, Flatpak, and X11.
Added randomized playback loop delays, schedule intervals, and shortcut repeat delays.
Improved localization coverage for tabs, editor text, runtime states, placeholders, and language settings.
Improved Linux support with Niri and COSMIC detection, batched input simulation, stronger permission handling, clearer setup guidance, and GNOME warning replay.
Improved existing Flatpak integration with better host clipboard handling and cleaner build inputs.
Improved CLI and headless automation with cleaner JSON output and more reliable daemon detection.
Improved release packaging with stricter validation, refreshed package metadata, Avalonia 12, and compact portable Windows packages.

description.p: Version 1.0.1 - Major Linux workflow improvements for scripting and Wayland environments.

ul.li: Fixed a Linux mutex contention issue that could cause intermittent daemon synchronization failures.
Added Wayfire Wayland compositor support for absolute pointer position integration.
Added the current-position action for using live cursor coordinates in automation flows.
Expanded the script engine with structured control flow: if, for, while, continue, and break.

description.p: Version 0.9.9 - Improved Linux packaging reliability and refreshed application metadata.
Version 0.9.8 - Added Flatpak support with Wayland compatibility.
Version 0.9.0 - Major update with Macro Editor and Themes support.
Version 0.8.4 - Bug fixes and improvements.
Version 0.8.2 - Fixed daemon service path and Polkit configuration issues.
Version 0.8.1 - Bug fixes and improvements.
Version 0.8.0 - Added Shortcuts and Scheduling features.
Version 0.7.2 - Native Wayland Integration, UI Refinements, and Core Fixes.
Version 0.7.1 - Bug fixes and improvements.
Version 0.7.0 - Added macOS platform support.
Version 0.6.1 - Added automatic GitHub update checking and notification support.
Version 0.6.0 - Improved daemon architecture and packaging.
